title: Friends Vocabulary in Spanish
intro: Learn Spanish vocabulary for talking about friends, plans, invitations, and social life.

phrases.spanish: Voy a salir con mis amigos.
phrases.english: I am going out with my friends.
Do you want to meet up this afternoon?

phrases.spanish: Mi mejor amiga es muy divertida.
phrases.english: My best friend is very fun.

phrases.spanish: Tenemos un plan para el s?bado.
phrases.english: We have a plan for Saturday.

fun_phrase.spanish: Un buen amigo siempre trae buena energ?a.
fun_phrase.english: A good friend always brings good energy.

translate.prompt: I am going out with my friends.
translate.answer: Voy a salir con mis amigos.

translate.prompt: Do you want to meet up this afternoon?

complete.answer: Mi mejor amiga es muy divertida.
